title: Lab Data
description: Schema for BYU-Idaho anatomy lab content configuration (lab_data.json)

$schema.description: Path to this JSON Schema file for editor validation.

title.description: Lab title displayed in the header bar (e.g., 'Skull Lab').

sections.description: Ordered list of sections shown in the sidebar navigation.

Section.description: A top-level navigation section (e.g., a week or unit).

id.description: Unique identifier for this section (e.g., 'week1'). Not shown in the UI.

title.description: Heading displayed above this section's tree in the sidebar.

data.description: Top-level tree nodes for this section.

TreeNode.description: A single item in the navigation tree. May contain nested children.

id.description: MUST be unique across all nodes in the entire file. Used for tree selection tracking.

label.description: Text displayed in the sidebar menu.

type.description: Content type. Controls which component renders when this item is selected.

sound.description: Path to a .wav pronunciation file relative to public/ (e.g., 'Sounds/frontalbone.wav'). Used with type 'img'.

load.description: Path to an HTML lecture page relative to public/ (e.g., 'Pages/intro.html'). Used when type is absent.

buttons.description: View-angle buttons for the image viewer. Required when type is 'img'.

child_items.description: Used for 'video' and external 'html' type nodes.

children.description: Nested child tree nodes shown as sub-items in the sidebar.

Button.description: A view-angle button in the image viewer.

img.description: Path to the image file relative to public/ (e.g., 'Images/frontal-ant.jpg').

ChildItem.description: Payload for video or external HTML nodes.

video_link.description: Full Kaltura embed URL for a video node.

page.description: Full URL to open in a new browser tab for an external html node.
